name: Jokai Bableves (Bean Soup a La Jokai)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the smoked pig's feet and pork ribs in 2 quarts of water until the meat comes off the bones. Remove and set aside.
2. Add diced celery and beans to the meat broth. Cook until the beans are done.
3. In a separate pan, fry onion in lard over low heat. When onion is wilted, add parsley and flour. Stir often to prevent burning, then cook into a light brown roux on the lowest heat possible.
4. Add paprika and garlic to the roux. Immediately stir in 1 cup of cold water. Whisk until smooth and pour into the beans.
5. Add smoked sausage and salt. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Cut the smoked meats into small pieces and add to the soup. Adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Serve with Little Pinched Dumplings (recipe). Any type of beans, such as cranberry or pinto beans, can be used. If using dried beans, soak them overnight first.
